case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JUAN CARLOS GARCIA MONTERROSO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS GARCIA MONTERROSO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND IS REQUESTING A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA MONTERROSO, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF - VERONICA ROSALES] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
